headline: The Kraft Heinz Company (KHC) Announces 5-Year Partnership With the National Football League
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is one of the best undervalued stocks under $50 to invest in now. The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) announced on March 18 a five-year global partnership with the National Football League, making it the first-ever global condiment partner of the NFL. Management stated that the partnership aims to unlock premium […]

headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation Check After PowerMac Launch NFL Deal And Major Mont Royal Investment
summary: Why Kraft Heinz stock is back on investors’ radar Kraft Heinz (KHC) has drawn fresh attention after a trio of updates: the launch of higher protein PowerMac, a five year global NFL partnership, and a C$250m modernization of its Mont Royal plant in Montreal. See our latest analysis for Kraft Heinz. headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Kraft Heinz, Lowers Price Target to $21
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) with a Underweight and lowers the price target from $22 to $21.
